ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the exchange's website */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for accessing exchange data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the exchange (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is based */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the exchange was founded */,
  "trading_fee" TEXT /* Average trading fee percentage */,
  "security_rating" INTEGER /* Security rating (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading pair */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency of the trading pair */,
  "quote_currency" TEXT /* Quote currency of the trading pair */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading pair */,
  "min_trade_amount" TEXT /* Minimum trade amount allowed for the pair */,
  "max_trade_amount" TEXT /* Maximum trade amount allowed for the pair */,
  "trading_volume_24h_all_exchanges" TEXT /* 24-hour trading volume across all exchanges for the pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading pair */,
  "volume_24h" TEXT /* 24-hour trading volume in USD */,
  "price" TEXT /* Current price of the trading pair */,
  "volume_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of total trading volume on the exchange */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "high_price_24h" TEXT /* Highest price of the trading pair in the last 24 hours */,
  "low_price_24h" TEXT /* Lowest price of the trading pair in the last 24 hours */,
  "volume_change_24h" TEXT /* Change in trading volume over the last 24 hours */,
  "price_change_24h" TEXT /* Change in price over the last 24 hours */,
  "volume_change_percentage_24h" TEXT /* Percentage change in trading volume over the last 24 hours */,
  "price_change_percentage_24h" TEXT /* Percentage change in price over the last 24 hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user account creation */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry being accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, custom) */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of report generation */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or summary of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, error) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
